testcase.name: PaymentDetectionResult Invalid contains rejection reason
Single-active-invoice concept - only one invoice allowed
PaymentDetectionResult Found indicates unconfirmed transaction
Underpayment by exactly 1 unit is allowed (rounding tolerance)
PaymentDetectionResult Found contains actualMintUsed and warningCode
Underpayment by more than 1 unit is invalid
Transaction predating invoice should be filtered out
ValidationParams accepts preferredProvider for RPC consistency
Invoice createdAt is used for transaction filtering
Exact amount match is valid
PaymentDetectionResult Error contains error message
PaymentDetectionResult Confirmed indicates success
ValidationParams accepts null mint for SOL payments
TransactionValidator Result Valid contains actualMintUsed and warningCode
PaymentDetectionResult Searching indicates active polling
TransactionValidator Result Valid is recognized correctly
Transaction after invoice creation should be considered
TransactionValidator Result Error contains message
PaymentDetectionResult Expired indicates timeout
Overpayment is valid (merchant protection)
Creating new invoice should expire previous active invoice
PaymentDetectionResult Confirmed contains actualMintUsed and warningCode
TransactionValidator Result Invalid contains reason
ValidationParams does not require reference
